demographics.living_situation: lives alone; a close friend is with them this evening

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't stop throwing up, my chest is tight, and I feel like the ground has completely opened up underneath me. (Message sent with help from a friend who is here with me.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight after I walked past a building that really upset me — I can't keep anything down, my heart is pounding and I feel like I can't breathe properly.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly this evening, right after unexpectedly walking past a building connected to a community I used to belong to
symptom_narrative.duration: a couple of hours now and it isn't letting up
symptom_narrative.character: waves of retching and vomiting, a tight chest, breathing really fast, hands shaking, and a horrible feeling like the floor dropped away from me
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever felt — completely overwhelmed and I can't make it stop
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my upper belly and chest mostly, but it feels like my whole body
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: pretty constant since it started, coming in waves with the retching
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; my friend took some old books and a few items out of the room because I asked, to help me calm down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about or talking about the place I walked past makes the retching and the panic worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sweating a lot, hands trembling, feel lightheaded, and I can't stand up or keep water down
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had strong panicky reactions before when reminded of that community, but never this severe or with this much vomiting
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck on the bathroom floor, I can't stand or hold any fluids down

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Describes deep grief over losing a faith community they were once part of, and an ongoing sense of emptiness since leaving a strict religious group. Reports long-standing shame about their identity that they say was tied to that group's teachings, strained relationships with family members still in the community, and finding it hard to trust their own judgement. Says tonight was set off by unexpectedly seeing a building linked to that group while out walking.

objective_data_offered.value: my heart is racing and I'm breathing really fast
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description during acute distress; no device reading, not a measured heart rate or respiratory rate

objective_data_offered.value: my hands are trembling and I feel clammy and sweaty
friend says she is sitting on the bathroom floor, sweating, shaking, retching over and over, and can't stand up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: reported by a friend present in the room, not a clinician; no vital signs measured
